decisions.question: Welche Source-Root-Option soll als naechster Zustand gelten?

choices.label: Keep source-root blocked
choices.caution: Owner is not ready to identify the complete private architecture library root.

choices.label: Repair OneDrive first
choices.caution: Owner says the intended source root is a OneDrive mirror but sync markers/completeness are not resolved.

choices.label: Select visible exact root for metadata diagnostic
choices.caution: Visible archive subtree; owner/overseer may confirm this exact path before diagnostics.

decisions.safe_after_answer: Run source-root decision checks and activation preflight before any private metadata inventory.

decisions.question: Welche offenen Reference/Asset Review-Batches duerfen als naechstes bearbeitet werden?
decisions.safe_after_answer: Record answers into owner intake/session only; keep public-ready at 0.

hard_stops: Do not record an owner decision automatically.
Do not run private metadata inventory from this brief.
Do not read private source contents.
